title: oldenlandia brachyloba
intro: Oldenlandia brachyloba, also known as 'Xiao Chai Hu' in Chinese, is a traditional herbal plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, Oldenlandia brachyloba is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, decoctions, or pills to harness its medicinal benefits.
